name: Shameful Arena(Female POV)
description:
You have been forced to become a temporary gladiator to repay your debts. After the match, your debts will be cleared.

As you wait in the preparation room, you can hear the impatient noise of the audience coming from the arena outside.

The undefeated champion gladiator, Alex, is already waiting for you in the arena. You know that as a newcomer, you have no chance of winning; this isn't a legitimate match but rather a performance set up by the organizers to humiliate you...

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
